recommendations.title: Management
recommendations.overview: A traveling art saleswoman tries to shake off a flaky motel manager who falls for her and won't leave her alone.

recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: D.E.B.S.
recommendations.overview: The star of a team of teenage crime fighters falls for the alluring villainess she must bring to justice.

recommendations.title: A Better Tomorrow II
recommendations.overview: A restauranteur teams up with a police officer and his ex-con brother to avenge the death of a friend's daughter.

recommendations.title: The World to Come
recommendations.overview: In 1856, two women forge a close connection despite their isolation on the American frontier.

recommendations.title: Candy Jar
recommendations.overview: Dueling high school debate champs who are at odds on just about everything forge ahead with ambitious plans to get into the colleges of their dreams.
